name: Claim denied after ladder fall, what are my chances on appeal?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after ladder fall, what are my chances on appeal?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Good with strong evidence**—50%+ overturn rate with lawyer.[3]

Fix denial reasons like causation.

- New doctor opinion.
- Witness affidavits.
- Hearing prep.

File timely; persist.
